paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a 1.05% decrease from the prior close and a 24.28% decrease over the last 21 trading sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions about the stock's price and potential value. A director's resignation due to governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal have also been reported.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include an 8-K filing about the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and a SCHEDULE 13G filing.
